title: FeatureRecord
description: Ring completion tracking — one entry per feature. Appended to .aiwg/working/ring/features.jsonl

feature.description: Name or description of the feature

layer_a.description: Developer reality — syntax, imports, unit tests pass

layer_b.description: Integration reality — system tests, CLI subcommands, API endpoints pass

layer_c_first.description: User surface reality — passed on first attempt from user environment

layer_c_retries.description: Number of Layer C retry attempts before passing

layer_d.description: Generative reflection artifact — null means Layer D was skipped (ring violation)

kernels_extracted.description: Kernel summaries extracted during this feature's development

morpholepsis_signals.description: Morpholepsis signals that fired during this feature

ring_complete.description: true iff layer_a AND layer_b AND (layer_c_first OR layer_c_retries <= 3) AND layer_d != null
